scenes.title: Escape With a Nose for Freedom
scenes.summary: A whimsical trailer opening: the lab loses its gentlest experiment, who follows the scent of tea into rainy Portland.

shots.prompt: Trailer opening shot, sterile Shady Biotech Lab corridor under teal emergency lights, a glass door labeled PROJECT OOLONG clicks open, delicate feathered raptor silhouette sniffs the air with refined curiosity, whimsical indie comedy tone, warm 35mm texture, not scary.

Rainy Portland night, Oolong slips comically behind food carts and cyclists, nose lifted toward a drifting ribbon of aromatic steam, pastel storefronts and umbrellas, playful celeste energy, gentle creature framing.
Interior Mara's Tea Shop after closing, Mara Finch slumps behind the counter beside unpaid bills and dusty tea tins, neon OPEN sign flickers sadly, cozy but failing, dry indie comedy composition.

scenes.title: The Back Room Sommelier
scenes.summary: Mara discovers Oolong hiding among tea tins and realizes the dinosaur has an uncanny gift for blending tea.

shots.prompt: Mara opens the cramped back-room door and freezes as Oolong delicately balances between shelves of tea tins, one claw politely holding a tin of oolong, both characters startled but gentle, warm lamp glow, comedic pause.

Close whimsical insert: Oolong's nostrils flutter over floating tea leaves, cinnamon, bergamot, and roasted oolong, aromatic particles sparkle like tiny constellations, elegant sommelier ritual, macro magical realism.
Mara skeptically sips Oolong's first blend from a chipped cup, her deadpan face softens into astonished joy, Oolong watches with anxious amber-eyed hope, cozy shop background.

scenes.title: Portland Falls in Love
scenes.summary: The tea shop becomes a citywide sensation while Mara and Oolong build an unlikely partnership.

shots.prompt: Morning montage shot, line of delighted Portland Customers stretches past bikes and ferns outside Mara's Tea Shop, hand-painted sign reads TODAY'S BLEND: RAPTOR'S ROAST, whimsical trailer bustle, warm rainlight.
Back room choreography: Mara labels jars while Oolong uses careful claws to measure tea leaves on a tiny scale, odd-couple rhythm, flour-dusted apron, teal feathers, cozy practical lighting.
Food blogger reaction montage in one dynamic shot, customers sip tea and levitate emotionally into blissful smiles, tiny handwritten review cards pile up, indie comedy magical realism, no horror.

scenes.title: No One Owns Perfect Oolong
scenes.summary: The biotech villains return, but the community rallies around Mara and Oolong for a heartwarming trailer finish.

shots.prompt: Dr. Voss enters the cozy tea shop in sleek black rainwear with two awkward lab agents, completely mismatched against ferns and mismatched chairs, Mara blocks the back room with deadpan defiance, comic corporate menace.

Heartwarming slow-motion: Portland Customers raise teacups in solidarity as Oolong peeks from behind Mara, amber eyes tender, steam curls around everyone like a protective blanket, whimsical trailer climax.

Final trailer button, Oolong wears a tiny bow tie and presents a perfect cup of oolong to Mara under the sign VELOCI-TEA, Mara smirks with affection, title card energy, cozy pastel indie comedy finish.
